summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW Gann Angles Trader features completed successfully. All backend APIs (Watchlist, Portfolio, Alerts, GPT Analysis, Backtest) and frontend integrations are working perfectly.
passed_tests: Watchlist CRUD: GET, POST, DELETE operations
Watchlist live prices endpoint
Portfolio CRUD: GET, POST, DELETE operations
Portfolio summary with P&L calculations
Alerts CRUD: GET, POST, DELETE operations
Alert checking and triggering system
GPT Analysis using Emergent LLM (Claude Sonnet 4.5)
Backtest module with multiple strategies (DEMON, Falling Knife, Golden Setup)
Frontend left sidebar navigation (Search, Watchlist, Portfolio, Alerts)
Frontend right sidebar navigation (Strategies, Ghost, Backtest, Tools)
Stock search and selection functionality
Add to watchlist via + button
Portfolio add form with buy price, quantity, date inputs
Alert creation form with price_above/price_below types
Backtest strategy selector and period buttons
GPT Analyze button integration and results display
Mobile responsive layout with 3 panels (Menu/Chart/Strategies)
All existing features still functional (stock search, chart, Gann Fan, strategies)
WebSocket real-time price streaming setup
All backend API endpoints returning correct status codes
Database operations with MongoDB collections
Error handling and validation

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components, navigation, forms, and integrations working)
